content.en:
Now.

What appeared in front of Ye Tian was an area shrouded in countless golden rays, and only through this area could one reach that treasure land.

This treasure land, even the Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Realm couldn't enter there.

"Endless Lord, after refining the token, let's go in with the token!"

The Lord of Eternal Zero.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Holding the token, he entered the area shrouded in countless golden rays and slowly advanced.

And the other nine other shore-level geniuses also came in, and their faces changed one by one.

Because, the higher the cultivation, the more suppressed it is here.

Therefore, the level of cultivation does not affect entering here, but as long as it does not exceed the bone transformation realm.

At this time.

Ye Tian knew why he had to be a genius at the other side to get in, there was a special power here, and the power of the origin of the other side of the genius was at the same frequency as the power here.

If it is not a genius of the other side, if he forcibly enters here, he will be directly shattered by the power here.

Soon.

He and the other nine other Shore-level geniuses walked through this area shrouded in golden rays and officially entered the treasure land.

Wow!

Space-time transformation.

The next moment, he came to a ruined space-time world.

Whoa!!!

Nine other Shore-level geniuses also came in.

The repression here has not gone away, though.

Ye Tian's cultivation was the lowest, so he was very little suppressed.

They didn't get together, but separated in an instant, looking for an opportunity.

How many opportunities there are here, Ye Tian doesn't know very well.

However, the opportunity here must not have reached the level of making the existence of the Lord of Chaos or the Holy Mountain on the other side desperate, otherwise it would not have been conceded.

Beings like the Lord of Chaos must know something about this.

Even the Lord of Eternal Zero didn't reveal much.

Therefore, once something is revealed, it needs more secrets to explain.

Therefore, the Lord of Eternal Zero only said that there was an opportunity here, and it was good for him.

Soon.

Ye Tian found something good.

"The Source Stone of the Other Side!"

Ye Tian dug out a source stone from a stone wall.

Obviously, this treasure land can give birth to the source stones on the other side.

But.

The source stone on the other side is certainly not the real chance here.

Of course.

There are other side source stones, Ye Tian naturally collects them, if he can find a large number of source stones on the other side, even if he doesn't get other opportunities, he doesn't care.

As time passed, he found more and more source stones on the other side.

Abrupt.

He felt a strong wave.

So, he immediately shuttled over.

Soon.

He saw several other Peer-level geniuses trying to attack a stone carving.

However, the aura emanating from the stone carvings could block the attacks of these other side level geniuses, and could even bounce back and shock them away.

As a result, they gradually gave up attacking.

Ye Tian also saw that there was something recorded on this stone carving.

Even the material of this stone carving itself is an incomparably rare material in the land of eternity, and any point can be used to make a divine weapon on the other side.

Because of this, these other shore-level geniuses wanted to take it.

Unfortunately, none of them can be taken away.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the stone carving and silently comprehended the traces on the stone carving.

Gradually, he became obsessed with it.

"It's ......"

"The method of condensing the heart of the other side!"

At this time, a genius of the other side level said: "It is an incomparably rare heart method of the other side, if it is in the outside world, it is indeed extremely precious. But we can't take it, and we can only meditate here, and we can't write it down. If you practice here, if you fail, your body will be severely injured at the least, and you will fall at the worst. There is no Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor here to help us protect the Dharma and save our lives. I don't dare to cultivate here, if you are enlightened, you can do it here!"

Wow!

He left here.

"Hahaha, I don't dare to cultivate!"

Swish!

He's out of here, too!

Even the Lord of the Heavenly Crossing did not dare to cultivate the Heart Method on the other side, sighed regretfully, and chose to leave.

In the end, only Ye Tian was left.

"I didn't expect there to be the Heart Method of the Other Shore here!"

Ye Tian is extremely excited!

The Heart of the Other Shore method is to cultivate the heart to the Heart of the Other Side, so as to affect the immeasurable blood, so that the immeasurable blood is transformed into the golden blood of the other side, and then affect the immeasurable bone, so that the immeasurable bone is transformed into the golden bone of the other side.

At that time, it will no longer be the bone transformation of the immeasurable bone, but the bone transformation of the golden bone on the other side.

Like the method of the golden body on the other side, it only turns the golden body on the other side of the surface body, and there is no way to transform the golden body on the other side with immeasurable blood and immeasurable bones.

Thus.

Even if the method of the golden body on the other side is to transform the golden body of the whole body, it is not a real complete golden body on the other side!

Only by cultivating the heart of the other side can the immeasurable blood and immeasurable bones be transformed into the golden blood of the other side and the golden bones of the other side.

In this way, it can be regarded as a true complete body on the other side, and when the time comes, it will lead to transformation, and thus evolve into a life form on the other side!

How powerful the lifeforms on the other side were, Ye Tian didn't know.

He had only seen it in the records of Gu Heng Mountain, and the life forms on the other side were terrifying, and he could easily comprehend the origin rules of the other side.

There is only one sentence.

Before, he didn't know the meaning of this sentence, but now he does.

In other words, once you become a lifeform on the other side, it is easy to break through to the Origin Realm!

"Gu Heng Mountain doesn't have the Heart Method on the other side, but there is one here, who is staying here?"

Ye Tian was curious.

However, he didn't think too much about it.

At this moment, he wanted to cultivate the heart of the other side.

"Others don't dare to cultivate the heart of the other side for fear of falling, after all, there is no elder support here. But I'm not afraid of falling, copying the fall of the body can continue to copy. Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He began to cultivate the Heart Method on the Other Side.

This kind of method must be comprehended all the time before you can remember it and be able to cultivate, otherwise you will soon forget it.

Because this method involves the imprint of the original rules of the other side, if you don't comprehend the original rules of the other side, you can't leave any traces on your body, and your memories can't be left.

However, this method was only useful for the Bone Transformation Realm, and once he broke through to the Origin Realm, he would be useless.

Ye Tian did not let this copy body cultivate, but let other copy bodies cultivate in the outside world.

Soon, the first cultivation began!

It didn't take long for him to fail in his cultivation.

Airplanes!

The flesh was shattered directly, turned into pieces, and fell to death.

This is the price of failure in cultivation!

"A terrifying rule directly made my body return to ruins and turn into fragments, no wonder those other shore-level geniuses didn't dare to cultivate. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He copied the body again and began his second cultivation.
